landing.heroDesc: The comprehensive platform for modern agricultural management. Organize your lands, coordinate tasks and keep your entire team connected from anywhere.
landing.featuresTitle: What can you do with Agrogestión?
landing.featureLandsDesc: Register and manage your farms, plots and crops. All your land organized in one panel.
landing.featureTasksDesc: Create, assign and supervise agricultural tasks with real-time tracking and notifications.
landing.featureTeamDesc: Managers, foremen and workers coordinated. Each one with their defined role and permissions.
landing.featureReportsDesc: Visualize task progress, team performance and crop status.
landing.featureSecurityDesc: Each user sees only what corresponds to them. Administrator, manager, foreman or worker.
landing.featureLanguagesDesc: Available in Spanish, English and Romanian. Your team can work in their preferred language.
landing.step1Desc: Create your account in seconds and choose your role: manager, foreman or worker.
landing.step2Desc: Managers register lands and define the team structure.
landing.step3Desc: Create tasks, assign them to foremen and they distribute them to workers.
landing.step4Desc: Follow progress in real time. Your entire team synchronized.
landing.privacyContent:
At Agrogestión, we are committed to protecting our users' privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal information.

1. INFORMATION WE COLLECT
We collect the information you provide when registering: name, surname, email, phone number and national ID. We also collect platform usage data such as created tasks, managed lands and general activity.

2. USE OF INFORMATION
We use your information to: provide and maintain the service, manage your account, communicate with you about updates or changes, and improve the user experience.

3. DATA PROTECTION
We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data, including password encryption, secure connections (HTTPS) and role-based access policies (RLS).

4. DATA SHARING
We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties, unless required by law or necessary for service provision (such as our infrastructure provider Supabase).

5. YOUR RIGHTS
You have the right to access, rectify, delete or limit the processing of your personal data. You can exercise these rights by contacting us through the provided email.

6. DATA RETENTION
We retain your data while your account is active. If you request account deletion, we will delete your data within a maximum of 30 days.

Last updated: March 2026
landing.termsContent:
Welcome to Agrogestión. By accessing and using this platform, you accept the following terms and conditions.

1. ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS
By registering and using Agrogestión, you accept these terms in their entirety. If you disagree, you should not use the platform.

2. SERVICE DESCRIPTION
Agrogestión is an agricultural management platform that allows managers, foremen and workers to organize lands, tasks and work teams.

3. USER ACCOUNTS
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

4. ACCEPTABLE USE
You agree to use the platform only for legitimate purposes related to agricultural management. It is prohibited to: attempt to access other accounts, manipulate other users' data, use the platform for illegal activities, or attempt to breach system security.

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All Agrogestión content (design, code, logos, texts) is the property of Agrogestión and is protected by intellectual property laws.

6. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
Agrogestión is provided "as is". We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free. We shall not be liable for losses arising from use of the platform.

7. MODIFICATIONS
We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of significant changes.

8. APPLICABLE LAW
These terms are governed by the laws of Spain. Any disputes shall be submitted to the competent courts.

Last updated: March 2026
landing.cookiesContent:
This policy explains how Agrogestión uses cookies and similar technologies.

1. WHAT ARE COOKIES?
Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences and improve your experience.

2. COOKIES WE USE

• Essential cookies: necessary for the platform to function. These include the authentication session cookie that keeps you logged in.

• Preference cookies: store your preferred language and other interface settings.

• Local storage cookies: we use sessionStorage to securely maintain your active session.

3. THIRD-PARTY COOKIES
We use Supabase as our authentication and infrastructure provider, which may set its own technical cookies necessary for the service.

4. COOKIE MANAGEMENT
You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect platform functionality. Essential cookies are required to use Agrogestión.

5. DURATION
Session cookies are deleted when you close the browser. Preference cookies are maintained until you manually delete them.

Last updated: March 2026
